creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
The diff seems strange in this 'update patch', I only need that this file:
https://github.com/vermaden/beadm/blob/1.2.6/beadm

Would be used in 1.2.6 sysutils/beadm port, other files haven't changed.

I do not mind what has been changed in Makefile as long as port is delivered.

Regards,
vermaden
